important notice & declaration - 1) all information provided by job applicants will be used for the consideration of employment with the tessellation group of companies. it might also be disclosed to our subsidiaries and associates for considering your suitability for employment. 2) if your application is successful, data obtained shall be retained and maintained by the company in your personnel data file for purpose connected with your employment. 3) all information of unsuccessful applicants will be destroyed within two years from the date on which the data is provided by the applicant. 4) requests for access to data, correction of data, information on kind of data held by the company should be in writing and addressed to the human resources manager. 5) the company applies equal opportunities philosophy to our hiring policies. each candidate is assessed solely according to individual’s capabilities to carry out the prospective job. there is no discrimination against any candidates on the grounds of gender, age, race, religion, nationality and disability.
